check_name: Ensure that Service Account Tokens are only mounted where necessary

external_context.check_name: Ensure that Service Account Tokens are only mounted where necessary
external_context.text:
External policy context for CKV_K8S_38

Check name:
Ensure that Service Account Tokens are only mounted where necessary

Problem from trusted Checkov report:
Ensure that Service Account Tokens are only mounted where necessary

Risk from trusted Checkov report:
Automatically mounted service account tokens may expose Kubernetes API credentials to workloads that do not need Kubernetes API access.

Fix from trusted Checkov report:
Set automountServiceAccountToken to false unless the pod needs Kubernetes API access.

Relevant external extract:

4  | metadata:
5  |   name: pod1
6  | spec:

9  |     image: alpine
